existing_features.title: Fix the 'Unauthorized: Only admins can perform this action' error that appears in the Admin Panel when logged-in admin users attempt to upload site images (logo, cover/hero image) or save social links (WhatsApp number, Instagram URL). The backend must correctly recognize the session established by the client-side adminAuth utilities and allow these mutations to proceed without returning an authorization error.

projectName: Fix admin authorization error in Admin Panel
